headline: KLA Corporation (KLAC) Price Target Raised by $500. Here is Why
summary: With a net profit margin of 35.66%, KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026. KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) develops industry-leading equipment and services that enable innovation throughout the electronics industry.
